import requests

ALLOWED_DOMAINS = {"trusted.com", "partner.io"}

def fetch_external_data(user_domain):
    # Correct: URL is checked against an allowlist before making a request
    if user_domain not in ALLOWED_DOMAINS:
        raise ValueError("Untrusted domain")
    url = f"https://{user_domain}/metadata"
    return requests.get(url).json()
